The '''''Expeditious''''' was a [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]] that served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Rojahn]]. Intelligence Agent [[Kirtan Loor]] was aboard the cruiser when it intercepted the freighter ''Starwind'', carrying former Corellian Security officer [[Gil Bastra]]. Bastra was on the run from the Empire, having forged identities for [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]], and [[Diric Wessiri|Diric]] and [[Iella Wessiri Antilles|Iella Wessiri]], to help them escape from [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], and had been pursued by Loor for nearly two years. Taken aboard the ''Expeditious'', Loor interrogated him for the whereabouts of his friends, but Gil died from exposure to [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] because of an [[Allergy/Legends|allergy]] he had developed.

On a later mission, the ''Expeditious'' was escorted by the [[Lancer-class frigate/Legends|Lancer-class frigate]] [[Ravager (Lancer-class)|''Ravager'']] to the [[Rachuk system/Legends|Rachuk system]], where it was to meet up with Kirtan Loor and carry him directly to [[Coruscant/Legends|the capital city]]. The two ships arrived in system at the same time as the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] was attacking the Imperial base on the planet [[Vladet]]. The ''Ravager'' was dispatched to engage the enemy fighters while ''Expeditious'' remained in safe proximity from the battle. Kirtan Loor, aboard the shuttle ''Helicon'', arrived just as the New Republic destroyed the ''Ravager'', and quickly landed aboard the ''Expeditious'', allowing the cruiser a prompt getaway from the engagement.

==Appearances==
